Interacting_Proteins.reason: OsCOI2 interactions with OsJAZ3/4/6/7/12 are supported by pull-down data.

Protein_Complex_Involvement.reason: OsCOI2 participates in OsCOI2-OsJAZ coreceptor complexes.

Core_Phenotypic_Effect.reason: Selective OsCOI2-associated signaling is tied to increased lignin/BPH resistance without major growth inhibition.

Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene.reason: The summary matches Results showing broader OsCOI2 interaction capacity and its strong representation in the In-Ile-responsive receptor set.

Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu.reason: The paper supports receptor-targeted chemical defense induction strategies in rice.

Other_Important_Info.reason: The current paper uses OsCOI2 mechanistically in the selective receptor module while also citing prior work on defense specialization.
